title: GitHub Issue Scout input
description: Configure public GitHub issue search queries and lead limits.

queries.title: GitHub search queries
queries.description: GitHub issue search queries. Add is:issue to avoid pull requests.
prefill: bounty "good first issue" is:issue state:open comments:<10 updated:>2026-04-01
default: bounty "good first issue" is:issue state:open comments:<10 updated:>2026-04-01

limit.title: Results per query
limit.description: Maximum GitHub results to inspect per query. Kept small to avoid unnecessary API load.

outputKey.title: Summary output key
outputKey.description: Key-value store key for the summary object.
